glue.crawler.schedule.CfnAbout: A scheduling object using a `cron` statement to schedule an event.

glue.crawler.schedule.ScheduleExpression.Description: A `cron` expression used to specify the schedule. For more information, see [Time-Based Schedules for Jobs and Crawlers](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/monitor-data-warehouse-schedule.html). For example, to run something every day at 12:15 UTC, specify `cron(15 12 * * ? *)`.
